'''ngavofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niaproof|niaproof]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niaproof|niaproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngavofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngævefeth|ngævefeth]] || [[word:ngævefej|ngævefej]] || [[word:ngævefesh|ngævefesh]] || [[word:ngævefe|ngævefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngavovofoth|ngavovofoth]] || [[word:ngavovofoj|ngavovofoj]] || [[word:ngavovofosh|ngavovofosh]] || [[word:ngavovofo|ngavovofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngavofoth|ngavofoth]] || [[word:ngavofoj|ngavofoj]] || [[word:ngavofosh|ngavofosh]] || [[word:ngavofo|ngavofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngavoffoth|ngavoffoth]] || [[word:ngavoffoj|ngavoffoj]] || [[word:ngavoffosh|ngavoffosh]] || [[word:ngavoffof|ngavoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngavofotho|ngavofotho]] || [[word:ngavofojo|ngavofojo]] || [[word:ngavofosho|ngavofosho]] || [[word:ngavofoko|ngavofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngavofoth|ngavofoth]] || [[word:ngavofoj|ngavofoj]] || [[word:ngavofosh|ngavofosh]] || [[word:ngavofo|ngavofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngavofothol|ngavofothol]] || [[word:ngavofojol|ngavofojol]] || [[word:ngavofoshol|ngavofoshol]] || [[word:ngavofokol|ngavofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngavofothotho|ngavofothotho]] || [[word:ngavofojojo|ngavofojojo]] || [[word:ngavofoshosho|ngavofoshosho]] || [[word:ngavofoko|ngavofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngavofothon|ngavofothon]] || [[word:ngavofojon|ngavofojon]] || [[word:ngavofoshon|ngavofoshon]] || [[word:ngavofokon|ngavofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngavofothoro|ngavofothoro]] || [[word:ngavofojoro|ngavofojoro]] || [[word:ngavofoshoro|ngavofoshoro]] || [[word:ngavofokoro|ngavofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
